proof.title: Annotation Loop — Execution Feedback + Weekly Digest

annotation_api.description: CRUD for execution annotations. GET returns filtered annotations + domain summaries. POST records new annotation from skill/workflow execution. DELETE clears all (for testing).

weekly_digest.description: Generates structured digest: overall stats, per-domain sections with trend analysis, top learnings, auto-generated recommendations.
weekly_digest.digest_shape: title, period (start/end), generated, overall (totalExecutions, successRate, domainsActive, totalErrors), byDomain[], topLearnings[], recommendations[]

proxy_annotation_wiring.description: Every proxy call now auto-records both telemetry (recordUsage) AND annotation (collectAnnotation). Returns annotation ID in response.
proxy_annotation_wiring.outcome_derivation: success if no error, failure if error thrown

annotation_collector.interface: Annotation { id, timestamp, domain, playbook, skillOrWorkflow, outcome (success|partial|failure), durationMs, error?, learning?, toolsUsed[] }

annotation_loop_architecture.trigger: Every run_workflow / execute_skill / proxy connector call
annotation_loop_architecture.flow: Execution → collectAnnotation() → in-memory store → GET /api/annotations → digest analysis
annotation_loop_architecture.feedback: Weekly digest auto-generates recommendations based on trend analysis: declining domains, high error diversity, new failure patterns
annotation_loop_architecture.playbook_refinement: Top learnings surfaced in digest are candidates for playbook refinement notes / self-healing rules
annotation_loop_architecture.telemetry_integration: recordUsage() tracks invocation counts + error rates; annotation stores execution context + learnings

digest_trend_analysis.improving: Recent success rate > overall + 5 percentage points
digest_trend_analysis.declining: Recent success rate < overall - 5 percentage points
digest_trend_analysis.new: No recent annotations for this domain

cardinal_compliance.J_annotation_after_execution: Every proxy/connector call auto-records annotation — no manual step required
cardinal_compliance.shadcn_only: N/A — backend APIs only, no new UI components

integration_map.Phase_9: proxy/connector wired to recordUsage — now also records annotations
integration_map.Phase_10: Digest learnings feed into prompt upgrade + master synthesis

weekly_digest_cron_integration.output: Slack post to #jarvis-admin with digest summary + top recommendations
weekly_digest_cron_integration.self_healing_feed: Digest recommendations feed into playbook refinement cron (02:57 UTC daily)
